name: Holo Notepad++
summary: A fast, lightweight source-code editor in your browser tabs, line numbers, syntax highlighting for many languages, and find and replace.

description.p: Editing a quick note or a source file shouldn't need an install, a server, or a network. Open a tab and type.

A fast, lightweight code editor that runs entirely in the browser. The editor engine is CodeMirror 6, vendored byte-for-byte and served from your own machine no CDN, no telemetry. It opens many files at once in tabs, highlights dozens of languages, and finds and replaces across the document.

ul: Open many files at once in tabs
Syntax highlighting for JavaScript, Python, C/C++, HTML, CSS, JSON, Markdown and more
Line numbers, code folding, bracket matching and word wrap
Served from your own machine no server, no CDN

releases.description: Holo Notepad++ a fast, lightweight, browser-native source-code editor in the spirit of Notepad++. The editor engine is CodeMirror 6, vendored verbatim and bundled offline (Law L4: no CDN); the host shell adds tabs, a language picker with auto-detection from the file name, line numbers, code folding, bracket matching, word wrap, find and replace, and local session persistence. Serverless and content-addressed (Law L5).
